texto: Movie acting is a great job for your twenties: You travel all over, you have affairs with people, and you throw yourself into one part and then another. It gets more challenging as you get older, and it's not just having a daughter, it's wanting to have your own life and be yourself.
explicacao: Citação de Helen Hunt sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “Movie acting is a great job for your twenties: You travel all over, you have affairs with people,…” articula vida, daughter, great em registro de vida, com relevância para contextos como viagem e daughter.

It gets more challenging as you get older, and it's not just having a daughter, it's wanting to have your own life and be yourself.
